user.title: Connect to SRAT
user.description: Enter the connection details for your SRAT instance.

hassio_confirm.title: SRAT Add-on Discovered
hassio_confirm.description: The SRAT add-on **{addon}** has been discovered at `{host}:{port}`. Do you want to set up this integration?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the SRAT API. Please check the host and port.

abort.already_configured: This SRAT instance is already configured.
abort.not_srat_addon: The discovered add-on is not a recognized SRAT add-on.

custom_component_restart_required.title: SRAT: Home Assistant restart required
custom_component_restart_required.description: The SRAT custom component was recently installed, upgraded, or uninstalled. A Home Assistant restart is required to apply the changes.

confirm.title: Restart Home Assistant
confirm.description: Confirm to restart Home Assistant and apply the SRAT custom component changes. All automations, integrations, and services will be temporarily unavailable during the restart.

custom_component_missing.title: SRAT custom component not detected
custom_component_missing.description: The SRAT custom component is not installed under `/homeassistant/custom_components/srat` and no active WebSocket connection from Home Assistant is present. The integration may not function correctly. Install the component from the SRAT add-on Settings → Home Assistant section.

confirm.title: Acknowledge
confirm.description: Go to the SRAT add-on Settings → Home Assistant section to install the custom component and then restart Home Assistant.

addon_config_changed.title: SRAT add-on configuration changed externally
addon_config_changed.description: The add-on options file was modified outside of SRAT. Reload the SRAT add-on configuration to apply the new settings.
